text.仅界面展示_不参与_API: (UI display only, not sent to API)
text.回车或逗号添加_点击_chip_切换默认: (Enter or comma to add; click chip to set default)
text.第一个_chip_自动设为默认_删除默认_chip_后剩余第一个自动成为默认: First chip is default; if default is deleted, the first remaining becomes default.
text.OpenRouter_等自定义_OpenAI_兼容网关_若模型文档声明支持音频理: For OpenRouter and other OpenAI-compatible gateways: if the model docs declare audio support, check this to attach mic audio.
text.恢复后仅更新表单_不会自动保存_请点击_保存配置_后才会写入本机配置_API_密: Restore updates the form only, not auto-saved. Click Save settings to write locally. API keys are not cleared or changed.
text.是否要将该问题反馈_我们将附带相关日志_已脱敏: Report this issue? We will attach related logs (redacted).
text.模型名_API_地址_服务商_API_模式_已脱敏: Model name, API endpoint, provider, API mode (redacted)
text.推荐_通过_Velopack_直接下载并安装_主更新源_R2: Recommended: download and install via Velopack (primary R2 source)
text.若应用内更新较慢_可使用镜像或网盘_非主更新源: If in-app update is slow, use mirror or cloud drive (not primary source)
text.如果您正在使用_DanmuAI_并感觉到给您带来了帮助_或者是想支持我继续开发: If DanmuAI has helped you or you'd like to support continued development, you can support me in any of these ways:
text.通过以下二维码进行赞助_打赏作者一杯茶: Sponsor via QR codes below—buy the author a tea 🍵
text.感谢支持的朋友_您的每一份帮助都让_DanmuAI_变得更好: ❤️ Thank you for your support—every bit of help makes DanmuAI better!

placeholder.例如_刚切换自定义豆包后出现_期望提示填写_API_地址: e.g. after switching to custom Doubao, expect a prompt to fill API endpoint
